title: 酒店人教點樣搞尻 Indigo Hotel !!!

replies.msg:
呢間酒店正一垃圾
酒店人教路:

1. Write poor comments on tripadvisor, remember 落 hashtag. 酒店非常著緊 tripadvisor 評分, 話有 bed bugs, 污穢，差service

2. e platforms, e.g. Expedia, Booking.com 等係酒店命脈，bad mouth 埋 expedia booking.com 因為佢地唔安全, allow dangerous hotel sell on their platform

3. Indigo belongs to IHG group, send email to IHG HQ for their poor service, room not clean, bed bugs

4. if they hv restaurant, can comment on openrice

一定要嚇下佢， 好多酒店高層深深藍, 一個做左就會有其他酒店做

1 2 4 都ok

3就...同向林鄭投訴黑警有咩分別 ^_^
3.Indigo belongs to IHG group, send email to IHG HQ for their poor service, room not clean, bed bugs

https://www.facebook.com/byebuydayhk/photos/a.102902157734904/137041607654292/?type=3

各位，相信過左尋日大家都好傷心同好嬲，
好想做d野但係又咩都做唔到。
小編想用大家5分鐘時間去投訴Hotel Indigo.
一齊實行IF WE BURN, YOU BURN WITH US!

1） 去trip advisor 幫Hotel indigo比一星同review
https://bit.ly/2oj7swb

2）去Hotel indigo facebook比嬲同comment
https://www.facebook.com/Hotel.Indigo.AMEA/

3) 去Hotel indigo google比一星同comment
http://tiny.cc/eg3rdz
Template係下面可以用亦都歡迎自己自由發揮。

Template:
We are writing to express our utmost contempt and disgust at your staff, two top management and the security guards at Indigo Hotel Hong Kong.
During the protest in Oct 1st, they deliberately invite the protesters to enter the lobby to avoid the violent acts of the HK police on the streets but then call the police on them to make arrests. If they truly believe that protesters will harm or disturb any guests, they should not let them in, instead of calling the police on them. Their actions is unprofessional and unacceptable!

For a company “committed to delivering true hospitality for everyone” these actions made by your staff members represent an opposite of what you stand by, and we highly condemn these actions. We urge you to find the culprits of the staff members who called the police on the protesters and account for their action.
出賣香港人的下場就是Indigo
推 呢類低成本既真係要做多啲

Template:
We are writing to express our utmost contempt and disgust at your staff, two top management and the security guards at Indigo Hotel Hong Kong.
During the protest in Oct 1st, they deliberately invite the protesters to enter the lobby to avoid the violent acts of the HK police on the streets but then call the police on them to make arrests. If they truly believe that protesters will harm or disturb any guests, they should not let them in, instead of calling the police on them. Their actions is unprofessional and unacceptable!

For a company “committed to delivering true hospitality for everyone” these actions made by your staff members represent an opposite of what you stand by, and we highly condemn these actions. We urge you to find the culprits of the staff members who called the police on the protesters and account for their action.

Template:
We are writing to express our utmost contempt and disgust at your staff, two top management and the security guards at Indigo Hotel Hong Kong.
During the protest in Oct 1st, they deliberately invite the protesters to enter the lobby to avoid the violent acts of the HK police on the streets but then call the police on them to make arrests. If they truly believe that protesters will harm or disturb any guests, they should not let them in, instead of calling the police on them. Their actions is unprofessional and unacceptable!

For a company “committed to delivering true hospitality for everyone” these actions made by your staff members represent an opposite of what you stand by, and we highly condemn these actions. We urge you to find the culprits of the staff members who called the police on the protesters and account for their action.

小編想用大家5分鐘時間去投訴Hotel Indigo.
一齊實行IF WE BURN, YOU BURN WITH US!

1） 去trip advisor 幫Hotel indigo比一星同review
https://bit.ly/2oj7swb

2）去Hotel indigo facebook比嬲同comment
https://www.facebook.com/Hotel.Indigo.AMEA/

3) 去Hotel indigo google比一星同comment
http://tiny.cc/eg3rdz
Template係下面可以用亦都歡迎自己自由發揮。

Template:
We are writing to express our utmost contempt and disgust at your staff, two top management and the security guards at Indigo Hotel Hong Kong.
During the protest in Oct 1st, they deliberately invite the protesters to enter the lobby to avoid the violent acts of the HK police on the streets but then call the police on them to make arrests. If they truly believe that protesters will harm or disturb any guests, they should not let them in, instead of calling the police on them. Their actions is unprofessional and unacceptable!

For a company “committed to delivering true hospitality for everyone” these actions made by your staff members represent an opposite of what you stand by, and we highly condemn these actions. We urge you to find the culprits of the staff members who called the police on the protesters and account for their action.

仲俾錢佢賺
去google 同trip advisor唔洗住過
一路好走

大家嘅 Comments 要 creative D / Real D, 例如:
1. Terrible experience / the worst stay / nightmare
2. travel with family / for business / couples honey moon / with kids
3. Bad Service / Rude manners/ front desk & concierge are hostile
4. Broke down of Air-conditioning / Hot water pump/ toilet drainage / furniture molding / dirty swimming pool with fungi / malfunction of gym equipment /
5. Health problems: / Air-conditioner Contain Virus, sick after visit / food (in min-bar) contamination, vomiting for days / Food Poison, Diarrhea for days / Bed bugs / spider-web / skin rashes / Poor housing keeping / amenity leads to rashes and allergic
6.最後,最重要係 personal data leakage!! Connection with police and government / personal data for surveillance / CCTV handover to popo for 24 hr monitoring / hidden cameras installed inside hotel rooms / hotel Wi-fi network hacking into personal computers & smartphones
7. 記住記住寫 : Will never visit again / not recommended /not suggested/ do not choose this hotel ...

香港人加油!!
推

酒店人教路:

1. Write poor comments on tripadvisor, remember 落 hashtag. 酒店非常著緊 tripadvisor 評分, 話有 bed bugs, 污穢，差service

2. e platforms, e.g. Expedia, Booking.com 等係酒店命脈，bad mouth 埋 expedia booking.com 因為佢地唔安全, allow dangerous hotel sell on their platform

3. Indigo belongs to IHG group, send email to IHG HQ for their poor service, room not clean, bed bugs

4. if they hv restaurant, can comment on openrice
